summary: API ack still asserts task-pull authorization before heartbeat/progress job mutation or lookup.
API finish still asserts task-pull authorization and terminal status before claimed-job read, terminal update, and linked-run sync.
Finish sync remains downstream of a successful terminal job writeback and does not introduce CLI dependency into API internals.
CLI once runner still follows contract -> claim -> execute -> finish; loop runner treats heartbeat/poll/finish-writeback failures as failing stop reasons.
Command execution remains bounded by cwd resolution, abort propagation, timeout handling, and force-kill fallback.
No endpoint path, DTO shape, default-off flag, token fallback, Prisma schema, web UI, long-connection, or multi-instance behavior change was introduced by S002.
review_gate: Lifecycle/default-off/API-CLI contract review with zero unresolved P1/P2 findings.
